rationale: All acceptance criteria are already satisfied at base-rev b68117e87.

Evidence:
- cli/internal/registry/installer.go defines InstallPackageFromRemote, InstallPackageFromDir, and InstallPackageFromFS (lines 29, 63, 83), all routing through the shared core installFromExtractedDir (line 116). InstallPackage remains as a compatibility shim delegating to the remote path.
- cli/internal/registry/defaultplugin/embed.go embeds library/ via //go:embed and exposes FS() rooted at the package layout, with library/package.yaml declaring root + skill mappings.
- cli/internal/registry/installer_test.go contains the three required tests:
  - TestInstallPackageFromFSHonorsManifestMappings (line 208)
  - TestInstallPackageFromFSInstallsDefaultDDxPackageOffline (line 236) — uses offlineTransport to fail any network attempt
  - TestInstallPackageFromRemoteUsesSharedCore (line 277) — asserts identical file lists between remote and FS entrypoints
